title: taraxacum iseranum
intro: Taraxacum iseranum, commonly known as the Korean dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Taraxacum iseranum include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve skin health, and support liver function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
